name: Inspect Lattice Data
description: Renders any resolvable lattice path as JSON5 with structural annotations (entry counts, byte sizes), truncated to fit a byte budget (default 500). Smaller budgets summarise with /* +N more, size */ markers; larger budgets reveal more detail. Use when you need to understand the shape of large or unknown data without overwhelming your context — covia_read returns the raw value, covia_inspect produces a budget-controlled overview. Pass an array of paths to compare multiple values within one budget (each path gets an equal share). Single path returns a JSON5 string; multiple paths return a map of path → string.

paths.description: A single resolvable path or an array of them. Examples: 'v/info', 'w/vendors', or ['v/ops/json/merge', 'v/ops/json/cond'].

budget.description: Byte budget for the rendered JSON5 output (default 500). Larger budgets show more detail; smaller budgets truncate with structural annotations.

compact.description: If true, render single-line JSON5 output (default). If false, pretty-print with indentation.

result.description: Rendered JSON5 string (single path) or map of path → rendered JSON5 (multiple paths)
